goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should depart from 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should arrive by 19:30 and should depart from birmingham new street
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get attraction type
